title: Ubiquiti UF-NANO - U Fiber Nano
description: UF-NANO is a compact and at the same time robustly built GPON terminal element with an LED display for displaying the current throughput / IP address and the status of the Ethernet and optical line. The speed of the PON line is maximum (Rx/Tx) 2.488 / 1.244Gbps, the speed of the ethernet is 10/100/1000Mbps and the device as such can only be powered via a 24V passive PoE adapter. As such, the device serves to convert metallic to optical and can only use Bridge mode, not Router mode Device PoE power adapter 24V / 0.3A Power cord (4) screws and screw anchors Wall Mount Bracket
specsSearch: Optics Transmission speed 2.488 / 1.244 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 / 1490 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type GPON Polishing type APC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 20 .. 28V DC Max. power consumption [W] 7 Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 45 Width [mm] 77 Height [mm] 77 Depth [mm] 28
